productDisplayName: Lotto Men Sprint  Black Sports Shoes
description: This is a stylish shoe with a sleek shape in black from lotto. Wear it for indoor Sports or at the gym when you want a lightweight, practical shoe to enhance your performance. Not just for sports, this makes a great casual choice to wear with jeans – the simple design and black colour will coordinate with everything. Upper Synthetic leather upper with decorative stitch lines Central lacing for snug Fit Lightly padded tongue with collar for added comfort Outsole extended till the heel cup for anti-slippage function Midsole Soft, cushy printed footbed for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Full length phylon midsole for lightweight durability Outsole Rubber outsole with ridges below the arch of the foot for an ergonomic fit Circular lugs below the heel and forefoot for grip Vertical strip of rubber on the outsole with small flex grooves for superior traction Shoe care Do not machine wash Rub with wet cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
